positive: A stylized, vibrant neon-noir illustration of a celestial cityscape viewed from a perspective of an open book. The city is built from abstract geometry, futuristic skyscrapers, and glowing architectural arches. Include motifs of hummingbirds and constellations subtly integrated into the structural lines. The overall mood is magical, whimsical, and highly contrasting. Style: Synthwave meets Art Deco, rendered as a clean, graphic vector illustration with stark silhouettes and glowing neon accents. Composition: Centralized main cluster of buildings, allowing for maximum printable negative space around the edges. Lighting: Dramatic contrast, backlighting from the neon sources. Color Palette: Deep indigo, electric cyan, magenta, and bright yellow, emphasizing luminosity against darkness. Suitable for screen printing or embroidery print on apparel.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, messy, dirty, grain, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, lowres, noise, grayscale, photorealistic, low detail, ugly
